📍 Just Minutes from Disneyland

Skip the Theme Park Food.
Eat Like a Local.

Tacos Manuel is less than 2 miles from Disneyland Resort — the perfect pit stop before the magic or a delicious reward after a long day on your feet. Locals and visitors alike make it a tradition: real Mexican street food at prices the whole family will love, right in the heart of Anaheim.

🚗 Under 5 min by car 🌮 Under $10 per person 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Perfect for families ⭐ 4.6 Stars on Google

The Menu

Fan Favorite

Carne Asada Tacos

Juicy grilled beef on fresh corn tortillas, finished with cilantro, white onion, grilled jalapeños, and our house salsa.

Al Pastor Tacos

Slow-marinated pork with pineapple, achiote, and aromatic spices — a taste of Mexico City on every bite.

Super Burritos

Packed with your choice of meat, rice, beans, grilled onions and jalapeños in a perfectly toasted flour tortilla.

Super Nachos

Crispy chips loaded with carne asada, melted cheese, sour cream, guacamole, and our signature toppings.

Mulitas

The Full Experience
Carne Asada
Our Story

Family Roots,
Authentic Flavor

Tacos Manuel was born in 2020 from a simple belief: that everyone deserves a truly great taco made with real ingredients and real love. Located at 1612 W Katella Ave in the heart of Anaheim, we bring the flavors of Mexican street food straight to Southern California.

Everything we serve is made fresh daily — from our hand-pressed tortillas and slow-cooked meats to our Salsa Garden, made fresh every single day. We are locally owned and operated, and we pour our hearts into every plate that leaves our kitchen.

4.6★
